metadata.name: Prepare a Closing Binder for an M&A Deal

description: After an M&A deal has closed, a corporate paralegal needs to assemble a 'closing binder' with all the final, executed deal documents.

nodes.task_description: Gather all final, signed versions of the deal documents (e.g., Purchase Agreement, Disclosure Schedules, officer certificates).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent collects all the necessary documents.

nodes.task_description: Organize the documents in a logical order and create a table of contents.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent structures the binder in a clear and organized way.

nodes.task_description: Compile all documents into a single, indexed PDF to be shared with the client and other parties.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces the final electronic closing binder.
